# Salt Creek Advisory

> Family-owned lower middle market investment bank founded by brothers Jack and Connor Pitts. Sell-side and buy-side M&A advisory for business owners with roughly $2M-$75M in revenue ($500K-$5M EBITDA), with sector depth in early childhood education, business services, and industrials. Based in Chicago, Illinois, serving owners nationally.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/): firm overview and positioning
- [About](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/about): founding story of Jack and Connor Pitts
- [Team](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/team): principal bios and backgrounds
- [Capabilities](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/capabilities): sell-side, buy-side, valuation, and advisory services
- [Sectors](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/sectors): early childhood education, business services, industrials
- [MSP & IT Managed Services M&A Advisor](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/msp-ma-advisor): selling a managed service provider or IT services business
- [Dog Daycare & Pet Care M&A Advisor](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/pet-care-ma-advisor): selling a dog daycare, boarding, or grooming business
- [Process](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/process): the sell-side M&A process end to end
- [Valuation tool](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/valuation): free business valuation estimate
- [FAQ](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/faq): direct answers on valuation, timing, fees, confidentiality
- [Investors](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/investors): buy-side mandates for PE firms, family offices, strategic acquirers
- [Podcast](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/podcast): The Making Of, hosted by Jack Pitts
- [Articles](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/articles): guides on choosing an advisor, valuation, buyer types, and the sale process
- [Contact](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/contact): reach Jack and Connor directly
